info.name: Lucid Web Craftsman
info.description:
Mock API (dev) + Supabase Edge Functions.

- **OpenAPI:** `openapi/supabase-edge-functions.json` (run `npm run openapi:edge-functions`).
- **Secrets:** use `postman/Lucid-Web-Craftsman.local.postman_environment.json` (gitignored); copy from `.example`.
- **Mocks:** enable saved examples on Mock API folder → Create Mock Server in Postman.

item.name: Mock API (local)
item.description: Run `npm run start:api` (port 3001). See [backend/server.cjs](backend/server.cjs). Use saved examples for Postman Mock Server.

item.name: Supabase Edge Functions
item.description: Set `supabase_url` and `supabase_anon_key`. Use `access_token` (user JWT) where noted. Never commit secrets — use `.local` environment file.

request.description: READ order by Stripe session id. Optional header `x-guest-id` for guests.
READ Stripe session + order state after redirect.
Requires valid `x-csrf-token`, `x-csrf-nonce`, `x-csrf-hash` from the storefront. Expect 403 without them.

exec: // 403 without valid CSRF; 422 on bad body; 200 only with full valid flow

request.description: PayPal order creation; server validates cart.
Requires user JWT or internal auth per function.
Stripe signs the raw body; use Stripe CLI or saved mock examples.
Carrier callback; see function for auth and payload.

item.name: Admin & scheduled (invoke)
item.description: Most calls need **service role** or **admin JWT** and specific JSON bodies. Fill from admin UI network tab or function source. Default body `{}`.

request.description: Returns sitemap XML; uses GET in OpenAPI generator.

exec: // check-promo-alerts: adjust Authorization (user JWT vs service role) and body
